runners.formComment: Eye-catching performance to post a big 6 lengths victory in a Other last start at Launceston, clocking an excellent 16.02 for the 278m trip. Expecting another bold showing.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 461m at this track beaten 13 lengths (26.61) behind If Ever in a Grade 5 on April 2. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

runners.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished third at Launceston in 29.73 last time but the start prior clocked a fast 25.92 over 461m when just missed, at this track. Hard to top on the time from two back.
